channel.title: Gastrointestinal on The Tradewinds Brief
channel.description: Recent content in Gastrointestinal on The Tradewinds Brief

item.title: Bajan Brief – Miss Violet: Tuesday, April 14, 2026
item.description: Miss Violet has opinions about the gastrointestinal situation, the farm labour pipeline, and the Trinidad drama at CARICOM. She is not impressed by any of it.

item.title: Bajan Brief – Bajan Bugle: Tuesday, April 14, 2026
item.description: Barbados is sending fewer farm workers to Canada, there is a gastrointestinal situation, businesses are squeezed, and the world's oil problem is everyone's problem. Tuesday's Bugle.
